#  A Lazarus IDE plugin to view (and filter) all open files and quickly select the desired tab.


When I work with Lazarus, I usually have many files open, and sometimes it’s difficult to switch to another editor if the tab isn’t visible.
This plugin aims to make it easier to navigate to the desired tab by displaying a list of all open tabs sorted alphabetically and allowing you to filter the list to quickly find the tab you're looking for.

It adds an option to the tab's context menu:
“Editor tab list,” as well as to the main menu under the “View” category.
